posts.title: IELTS 5.5+ gives you the maximum foreign-language score at DTM — the 2026 rules
posts.summary: A valid B2 certificate (IELTS 5.5+) replaces the foreign-language exam with the maximum score: 93.0 as first subject, 63.0 as second. New for 2026: B1 gives 75%.

posts.title: GKS 2027: Korea's fully funded scholarship opens in September — embassy track first
posts.summary: Embassy track ~September 2026, university track ~October. Full tuition, monthly stipend, flights, 1 year of Korean.

posts.title: Türkiye Bursları 2027 expected in January — one window, don't miss it
posts.summary: One application period per year for all levels; the 2026 window was 10 Jan – 20 Feb. Full package including university placement.

posts.title: Erasmus Mundus 2027: fully funded master's across Europe — deadlines start this autumn
posts.summary: Programmes open October–December 2026, deadlines mostly November–February. Study in 2–3 European countries, funded by the EU.

posts.title: Chevening 2027/28 opens in August — deadline is 6 October 2026
posts.summary: The UK's fully funded master's scholarship returns. Uzbekistan is eligible. Timeline and preparation checklist.

posts.title: IELTS One Skill Retake is live in Uzbekistan — retake one skill, keep the rest
posts.summary: Retake only Listening, Reading, Writing or Speaking within 60 days — without redoing the whole exam.

posts.title: Stipendium Hungaricum 2027/28 opens around November — prepare now
posts.summary: Hungary's fully funded scholarship opens mid-November and closes mid-January, every year. Uzbekistan is eligible.

posts.title: El-Yurt Umidi 2026: 500 quotas in the first call — how to be ready for the next one
posts.summary: The first 2026 open call closed in April with 500 quotas. What to prepare before the next call.

posts.title: How much does IELTS cost in Uzbekistan in 2026?
posts.summary: Current test fees at IDP and the British Council, what the price includes, how to pay.
